Expert real estate guidance for the people who feed South Carolina.

Providing expert real estate guidance to restaurant owners, operators, and landlords. We build long-term, profitable partnerships that empower operators, champion hospitality entrepreneurs, and deliver innovative spaces that inspire unforgettable guest experiences.

Contact the WK Restaurant Group View Active Listings

Who We Serve

Real Estate Guidance Built for Hospitality

From site selection and leasing strategy to landlord representation and restaurant-ready spaces, Wilson Kibler helps hospitality clients make confident real estate decisions backed by deep local market knowledge.

  • Restaurant owners
  • Restaurant operators
  • Landlords with restaurant-ready spaces
  • Hospitality entrepreneurs
  • Investors and property owners looking to lease or sell restaurant spaces
